v01.description: The final precondition for HIV-negative status is joined with 'or' instead of the required 'and'.

v02.description: The population-prevalence precondition is joined to the gestational-age precondition with 'or' instead of the required 'and'.

v03.description: The required HIV-negative status precondition is missing.

v04.description: The required ANC contact number = 1 precondition is missing.

v05.description: The prevalence comparison is '<= 5 %' instead of the required '< 5 %'.

v06.description: The ANC contact number comparison is '!= 1' instead of the required '= 1'.

v07.description: The prevalence comparison is '> 5 %' instead of the required '>= 5 %'.

v08.define: Should HIV test is not required
v08.description: The define checks HIV-negative choices instead of the required HIV-positive choices.

v09.description: The HIV status precondition checks HIV-positive choices instead of the required HIV-negative choices.

v10.description: The prevalence threshold is 6% instead of the required 5%.
